description: Enable admins to invite, manage, and audit workspace membership.

userStories.title: Add membership invite and audit persistence models
userStories.description: As a system operator, I want membership and audit entities persisted so that admin actions have durable state and history.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership schema supports workspace user role and active membership status
Invite schema stores pending invite email token and expiration
Audit log schema stores actor action target and timestamp for membership events
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add admin invite member backend flow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that new collaborators can join with appropriate access.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only endpoint creates pending invite for email when not already active member
Invite flow validates workspace scope and email format
Invite creation records audit event for invite action
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add admin backend action to change member role
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles between viewer editor and admin so that permissions stay aligned with responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only endpoint updates target member role to viewer editor or admin
Role change validates actor cannot remove final admin from workspace
Role updates write membership-change audit event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add admin backend action to revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former collaborators no longer retain workspace permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only endpoint deactivates membership for selected member
Revocation prevents removed member from loading protected workspace resources
Revocation action writes audit event with actor and target member id
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend query for recent membership audit entries
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to fetch recent membership changes so that I can review who changed access and when.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only query returns recent membership audit entries ordered newest first
Response includes actor email action target member and timestamp fields
Query supports basic pagination for settings page list
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add workspace settings UI for inviting and managing member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want invite and role-management controls in workspace settings so that I can manage access without direct database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page shows invite form accepting email input and submit action
Members list shows role selector for each member with viewer editor and admin options
Role changes and invite submissions show success or error feedback in page context
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add workspace settings UI for revoking access and reviewing audit log
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want revoke controls and recent membership audit log in settings so that I can safely remove access and verify change history.
acceptanceCriteria: Members list provides revoke action per member with confirmation step
Recent membership changes section renders audit entries from backend query
Audit rows show actor action target and timestamp in readable format
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
